report.summary: Built 2 new learn pages — Best Perpetual DEX Comparison 2026 and Cross-Chain Bridge Security Guide 2026 — with full content, SEO optimization, and FAQ structured data fix for all learn pages.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Perpetual DEX market has captured 26% of global derivatives trading in 2026; Hyperliquid dominates with 70%+ market share at $4.9B daily volume
Top perp DEXs compared: Hyperliquid (native L1, 313 pairs, 50x), dYdX v4 (Cosmos, 182+ markets, 100x), GMX v2 (AMM, 7+ chains), Jupiter Perps (Solana, 250x), Drift (hybrid, $1.13B TVL)
Grayscale filed for HYPE ETF (March 2026); Vertex sunset Aug 2025; Aster emerged with 20% share
Cross-chain bridges lost $2.3B+ to exploits in 2025; Ronin ($623.5M), Wormhole ($320M), Poly Network ($612M) are largest hacks
Bridge architectures: lock-and-mint, liquidity network, intent-based, ZK bridges — ZK becoming standard in 2026
deBridge leads security with 26+ audits and zero exploits; Across V4 adding ZK settlement
